'''âdh-y-f-l''' ('''kadhayfeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecectomize|cecectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecectomize|cecectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-y-f-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadhayfeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhayfeloko|thidhayfeloko]] || [[word:jidhayfeloko|jidhayfeloko]] || [[word:shidhayfeloko|shidhayfeloko]] || [[word:kidhayfeloko|kidhayfeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhayfeloko|thĂŠdhayfeloko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhayfeloko|jĂŠdhayfeloko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhayfeloko|shĂŠdhayfeloko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhayfeloko|kĂŠdhayfeloko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
